Export.Routine:
ZSETUP ;; for IRIS1 ;; 1 setup SQLgateway to postgressql set gty=##class(%SQLConnection).%New() set gty.Name="postgres" set gty.URL="jdbc:postgresql://postgres:5432/" set gty.Usr="postgres" set gty.pwd="postgres" set gty.classpath="/opt/irisbuild/jdbc/postgresql-42.3.1.jar" set gty.driver="org.postgresql.Driver" set gty.isJDBC=1 set sc=gty.%Save()
;; 2 setup SQLgateway to mysql set gty=##class(%SQLConnection).%New() set gty.Name="mysql" set gty.driver="com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver" set gty.Usr="user" set gty.pwd="password" set gty.URL="jdbc:mysql://mysql:3306/db" set gty.classpath="/opt/irisbuild/jdbc/mysql-connector-j-9.7.0.jar" set gty.isJDBC=1 set sc=gty.%Save()
;; 3 setup SQLgateway to ibmDB2 set gty=##class(%SQLConnection).%New() set gty.Name="ibmDB2" set gty.Usr="db2inst1" set gty.pwd="password" set gty.driver="com.ibm.db2.jcc.DB2Driver" set gty.classpath="/opt/irisbuild/jdbc/db2jcc4.jar" set gty.URL="jdbc:db2://db2:50000/sample" set gty.isJDBC=1 set sc=gty.%Save()
;; 4 setup SQLgateway to MSsql set gty=##class(%SQLConnection).%New() set gty.Name="mssql" set gty.Usr="SA" set gty.pwd="MSSQLServer@2019" set gty.driver="com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerDriver" set gty.URL="jdbc:sqlserver://mssql:1433;encrypt=false;databaseName=AdventureWorks" set gty.classpath="/opt/irisbuild/jdbc/mssql-jdbc-13.4.0.jre11.jar" set gty.isJDBC=1 set sc=gty.%Save()
;; 5 setup SQLgateway to ORACLE set gty=##class(%SQLConnection).%New() set gty.Name="ORACLE" set gty.Usr="SAMPLEDB" set gty.pwd="Welcome1" set gty.driver="oracle.jdbc.driver.OracleDriver" set gty.classpath="/opt/irisbuild/jdbc/ojdbc8.jar" set gty.URL="jdbc:oracle:thin:@oracle21c:1521:XE" set gty.isJDBC=1 set sc=gty.%Save()
;; 6 setup SQLgateway to Caché set gty=##class(%SQLConnection).%New() set gty.Name="cache" set gty.Usr="_SYSTEM" set gty.pwd="SYS" set gty.driver="com.intersys.jdbc.CacheDriver" set gty.classpath="/opt/irisbuild/jdbc/cache-jdbc-2.0.0.jar" set gty.URL="jdbc:Cache://cache:1972/SAMPLES" set gty.isJDBC=1 set sc=gty.%Save()
;; 7 setup SQLgateway to IRIS2 set gty=##class(%SQLConnection).%New() set gty.Name="IRIS2" set gty.Usr="_SYSTEM" set gty.pwd="SYS" set gty.driver="com.intersystems.jdbc.IRISDriver" set gty.classpath="/opt/irisbuild/jdbc/intersystems-jdbc-3.10.5.jar" set gty.URL="jdbc:IRIS://iris2:1972/USER" set gty.isJDBC=1 set sc=gty.%Save() ;; zn "USER" do $system.OBJ.Delete("Samples.*") ;; done zn "%SYS" quit
